executive_summary: The build failed due to a GitHub Actions workflow configuration error. The workflow uses a deprecated version of actions/upload-artifact (v3), which has been automatically failed by GitHub. The fix requires updating the workflow to use actions/upload-artifact@v4.

errors.message: Deprecated version of actions/upload-artifact: v3 is no longer supported
errors.root_cause: The GitHub Actions workflow uses actions/upload-artifact@v3, which was deprecated on 2024-04-16 and is now automatically failed by GitHub.
errors.fix_recommendation: Update the workflow file to use actions/upload-artifact@v4. Replace 'actions/upload-artifact@v3' with 'actions/upload-artifact@v4' in .github/workflows/build.yml
